text.title: Design Docs Patterns Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every Design Docs Patterns application must enforce. These are HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override them.

rule.statement: Design doc MUST be written when feature work exceeds 1 engineering day.
rule.rationale: Past 1 day, retrospective rationale loses fidelity.

rule.statement: Doc MUST contain all of {context, goals, non-goals, proposed, alternatives, open-questions}; missing sections rejected.
rule.rationale: Missing sections hide the failure modes most likely to bite.

rule.statement: Non-goals section MUST be non-empty; un-stated non-goals invite scope creep.
Alternatives section MUST list ≥2 genuinely considered options; strawmen rejected.
rule.rationale: Single-option docs are advocacy; strawmen are theatre.

rule.statement: Circulation MUST set a review deadline; open-ended reviews rejected.
